content:
# elizaos-plugins/plugin-n8n-workflow Daily Update (Feb 20, 2026)
## OVERVIEW 
Today's development focused on addressing potential issues with AI node behavior within n8n workflows, with a new pull request opened to prevent multi-step confabulation and ensure AI nodes are correctly included in results.

## KEY TECHNICAL DEVELOPMENTS

## NEWLY OPENED PULL REQUESTS
A new pull request, [#19](https://github.com/elizaos-plugins/plugin-n8n-workflow/pull/19), was opened today. This PR aims to prevent multi-step confabulation and ensure that AI nodes are correctly included in the results of n8n workflows.
